description.value: Force Sensitive. Talortai are naturally sensitive to the Force, allowing them to distinguish between the Light and Dark sides. You can use your action to make a Wisdom (Insight) check against a target’s Charisma (Deception). On a success you learn the alignment of the target. On a failure, the target becomes immune to this feature for one day. This feature has no effect on droids or constructs. You can use this ability a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (a minimum of once). You regain all expended uses on a long rest. Additionally, once per day, you can cast the sense force force power. Your forcecasting ability is Wisdom.
